meaning: n.俄国人[语]adj.俄国的,俄国人[语]的
examples: Then came a bunt from Russ Davis.
It proved a momentous night for Martin, for after dinner he met Russ Brissenden.
The name on some lips was that of Russ Feingold a former senator from Wisconsin.
This is the conclusion of Russ Winter of Minyanville, a widely followed financial blog.
He replaced Russ Smyth, who resigned to become chief of an unnamed private company in Chicago.
